questions.context_sentence: The teachers' building is across from the school hall.
questions.hint: h + all (所有)，所有人都在大厅里。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 教师楼在学校礼堂的对面。

questions.context_sentence: Where's the dining hall?
questions.hint: dine (用餐) + ing + hall，用餐的大厅。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 餐厅在哪里？

questions.context_sentence: The classroom building is behind the sports field.
questions.hint: build (建造) + ing，建造出来的东西是建筑物。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 教学楼在运动场后面。

questions.context_sentence: It's between the library and the gym.
questions.hint: gym 缩写自 gymnasium，g-y-m 简短好记。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 它在图书馆和体育馆之间。

questions.context_sentence: What are the people doing on the sports field?
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What are the people doing on the ________? (提示: 运动场)
questions.cn: 人们在运动场上做什么？

questions.context_sentence: Where's Ms Gao's office?
questions.hint: off + ice，办公室里关掉(off)冰块(ice)才暖和。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: v. 听起来 n. 声音
questions.cn: 高老师的办公室在哪里？

questions.context_sentence: Is there a student centre in this school?
questions.hint: cen (森) + tre (树)，森林的中心有一棵树。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这所学校有学生中心吗？

questions.context_sentence: What's your new classroom like, Peter? It's large.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What's your new classroom like? It's ________. (提示: 大的)
questions.cn: 彼得，你的新教室怎么样？它很大。

questions.context_sentence: What's special in your classroom?
questions.hint: spec (看) + ial，特别的东西值得看。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你的教室里有什么特别的？

questions.context_sentence: There's a smart whiteboard next to the blackboard.
questions.hint: s + mart (市场)，市场上的人很精明(smart)。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 黑板旁边有一块智能白板。

questions.context_sentence: There's a smart whiteboard next to the blackboard.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There's a smart ________ next to the blackboard. (提示: 白板)
questions.cn: 黑板旁边有一块智能白板。

questions.context_sentence: Yes, we put up important notices there.
questions.hint: im + port (港口) + ant，进入港口的东西很重要。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 是的，我们把重要的通知贴在那里。

questions.meaning: n. 通知;注意 v. 注意到
questions.context_sentence: Yes, we put up important notices there.
questions.hint: not (不) + ice (冰)，通知大家不要滑冰。
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: n. 有锁存物柜;寄物柜
n. 通知;注意 v. 注意到
questions.cn: 是的，我们把重要的通知贴在那里。

questions.meaning: n. 有锁存物柜;寄物柜
questions.context_sentence: Are there any lockers in the classroom?
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 教室里有储物柜吗？

questions.context_sentence: We put our things in the desk drawers.
questions.hint: draw (拉) + er，拉出来的东西是抽屉。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: We put our things in the desk ________. (提示: 抽屉)
questions.cn: 我们把东西放在书桌抽屉里。

questions.context_sentence: The teacher's desk is in the corner, under a window.
questions.hint: corn (玉米) + er，躲在角落吃玉米。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 老师的桌子在角落里，窗户下面。

questions.context_sentence: Where are the bookcases?
questions.hint: book (书) + case (箱子)，放书的箱子/架子。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 书架在哪里？

questions.context_sentence: There's a screen on the wall.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There's a ________ on the wall. (提示: 屏幕)
questions.cn: 墙上有一块屏幕。

questions.context_sentence: And a teacher's desk in front of the blackboard.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 还有一张老师的讲桌在黑板前面。

questions.context_sentence: And a teacher's desk in front of the blackboard.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 还有一张老师的讲桌在黑板前面。

questions.context_sentence: There are many modern buildings.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There are many ________ buildings. (提示: 现代的)
questions.cn: 有许多现代建筑。

questions.context_sentence: It's amazing!
questions.hint: a + maze (迷宫) + ing，像迷宫一样令人惊奇。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 太棒了！

questions.context_sentence: They make delicious jiaozi.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他们做的饺子很好吃。

questions.context_sentence: How is Peter's school similar to yours?
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: How is Peter's school ________ to yours? (提示: 类似的)
questions.cn: 彼得的学校和你的学校有什么相似之处？

questions.context_sentence: How is Peter's school different from your old one?
questions.hint: different (不同的) + from (来自)，和...不同。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 彼得的学校和你的旧学校有什么不同？

questions.meaning: adj. & pron. 大多数 adv. 最
questions.context_sentence: We spend most of the time in our classroom.
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: adj. & pron. 大多数 adv. 最
questions.cn: 我们大部分时间都在教室里度过。

questions.meaning: v. 听起来 n. 声音
questions.context_sentence: Your school sounds fun!
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Your school ________ fun! (提示: 听起来)
questions.cn: 你的学校听起来很有趣！

questions.context_sentence: Yours, Peter
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: 你的;您的(名词性物主代词)
questions.cn: 你的，彼得

questions.context_sentence: Big windows bring in lots of sunlight and fresh air.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 大窗户带来了充足的阳光和新鲜空气。

questions.context_sentence: Big windows bring in lots of sunlight and fresh air.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Big windows bring in lots of sunlight and ________. (提示: 新鲜空气)
questions.cn: 大窗户带来了充足的阳光和新鲜空气。

questions.context_sentence: Yes, we put up important notices there.
questions.hint: put (放) + up (向上)，放上去就是张贴。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Yes, we ________ important notices there. (提示: 张贴)
questions.cn: 是的，我们把重要的通知贴在那里。

questions.context_sentence: All the students go there and do exercises together in the morning.
questions.hint: exercise 是练习/锻炼，do exercises 做体操。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 所有的学生早上都在那里一起做操。

questions.context_sentence: Every Monday we raise the flag there.
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: n. 有锁存物柜;寄物柜
questions.cn: 每周一我们都在那里升旗。

questions.context_sentence: Every Monday we raise the flag there.
questions.hint: f + lag (落后)，不要让国旗落后。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Every Monday we raise the ________ there. (提示: 旗帜)
questions.cn: 每周一我们都在那里升旗。

questions.context_sentence: Every week, we change seats.
questions.hint: chan (禅) + ge (格)，禅的风格在改变。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 每周我们都会换座位。

questions.context_sentence: Every week, we change seats.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: Every week, we change ________. (提示: 座位)
questions.cn: 每周我们都会换座位。

questions.context_sentence: Imagine a friend from another country has sent you an email.
questions.hint: s + end (结束)，发送完毕就结束。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 想象一下，一位来自另一个国家的朋友给你发了一封邮件。

questions.context_sentence: What do you like to do at school?
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: What do you like to do ________? (提示: 在学校)
questions.cn: 你在学校喜欢做什么？

questions.context_sentence: I study on a 'floating school'.
questions.hint: float (漂浮) + ing + school，漂浮着的学校。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我在一所“水上学校”学习。

questions.context_sentence: It's difficult to walk on some roads in the rainy season here.
questions.title: Vocab Master
options: adj. & pron. 大多数 adv. 最
questions.cn: 在这里的雨季，有些路很难走。

questions.context_sentence: It's in front of the art building.
questions.hint: front 是前面，in front of 在...前面。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It's ________ the art building. (提示: 前面)
questions.cn: 它在艺术大楼前面。

questions.context_sentence: The teachers' building is across from the school hall.
questions.hint: across (在对面) + from (来自)，合起来是在对面。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 教师楼在学校礼堂的对面。

questions.context_sentence: Oh, and there's another blackboard at the back of the classroom.
questions.hint: back 是后背，at the back 在后面。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 哦，教室后面还有一块黑板。

questions.context_sentence: I sit in the middle of the classroom.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: There is a table in the ____ the room. (提示: 中间)
questions.cn: 我坐在教室中间。

questions.context_sentence: How about your school?
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你的学校怎么样？

questions.context_sentence: Bye for now,
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 暂时再见，

questions.context_sentence: My floating school is a 'school bus' and classroom all in one.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: It is a kitchen, dining room and bedroom, ____. (提示: 多合一)
questions.cn: 我的水上学校是一辆“校车”和教室合二为一。

questions.context_sentence: It's next to the reading corner.
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 它在图书角旁边。

questions.context_sentence: How is Peter's school similar to yours?
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.prompt: How is Peter's school ________ yours? (提示: 类似的)
questions.cn: 彼得的学校和你的学校有什么相似之处？

questions.context_sentence: Is there a student centre in this school?
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 这所学校有学生中心吗？
